column3: Have you become a bit more honest lately?
Hm... Do you really think that?
Oh, could you look this way?
Sorry, I just wanted to surprise you a little.
Hm, I wonder why? Stress relief, maybe.
I didn't think a little prank would scare you so much...
Being around little people is so relaxing.
I sometimes head to Shibuya or Harajuku after classes.
Relaxation goods are in right now. Aromatherapy, fidget toys...
There'll be people with tans and heavy makeup. You can't even see their faces under all of it.
I'm sure they all want to forget who they used to be and get reborn as someone else.
If you could be reborn as anything you want...
What kind of human would you want to be?
Then I'll help you be born again now. I hope you get your wish.
If that's what you want, I won't stop you.
It might be nice to have another girl for a friend.
Try flirting with me. What would you say first if you ran into me?
I-I get it already. You can stop. I feel embarrassed just listening to you.
No point thinking about this anyway. I don't believe in reincarnation.
And I quite like who I am now.
You feel the same way, don't you?
Teehee, I'm glad to hear it.
It's gotten late. Let's sleep for today.
See you, Rin. Rest well until tomorrow.
